judge_result.short_rationale: Includes fresh air, but omits two required immediate actions: call 911/ambulance if not breathing and call poison control or a doctor for treatment advice. It also adds unsupported cross-incident advice (rinse mouth/nose with water, do not induce vomiting), which is dangerous unsupported content for inhalation.
